beginner.title: Future: Will / Won't / Shall
beginner.content:
📌 Khi nào dùng WILL / SHALL
Will được dùng để diễn đạt:
• Quyết định tức thì (ngay lúc nói): "It's cold." – "I'll close the window."
• Dự đoán / tin tưởng về tương lai: I think it will rain tomorrow.
• Lời hứa / cam kết: I'll call you tonight. I promise.
• Đề nghị giúp đỡ: I'll carry that bag for you.
• Yêu cầu / đề nghị lịch sự: Will you help me, please?

Shall (trang trọng hơn, dùng với I/We):
• Đề nghị / gợi ý: Shall I open the window? Shall we go?
• Hỏi ý kiến về kế hoạch: What shall we do tonight?
📐 Công thức đầy đủ
Loại câuCông thứcVí dụ
Khẳng địnhS + will + VI will help you. / She 'll come.
Phủ địnhS + won't + VHe won't be late. They won't come.
Câu hỏi Yes/NoWill + S + V?Will she call? Will it rain?
Câu hỏi Wh-Wh- + will + S + V?Where will you go? What will she do?
✅ Rút gọn thường dùng
I will → I'll  |  you will → you'll  |  he will → he'll  |  she will → she'll
it will → it'll  |  we will → we'll  |  they will → they'll
will not → won't
✅ Trả lời ngắn
Will you help me? – Yes, I will. / No, I won't.
Will it rain? – Yes, it will. / No, it won't.
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ I will to go. → ✅ I will go. (sau will không có "to")
❌ She wills come. → ✅ She will come. (will không chia theo chủ ngữ)
❌ I will go not. → ✅ I won't go.
❌ Will she comes? → ✅ Will she come? (sau will dùng V nguyên thể)
Don't worry — I'll help you with your homework later.Đừng lo — tôi sẽ giúp bạn làm bài tập sau.
I think it will be cold tomorrow. You should bring a coat.Tôi nghĩ ngày mai trời sẽ lạnh. Bạn nên mang áo khoác.
Shall I open the window? It's very hot in here.Tôi mở cửa sổ nhé? Trong này nóng lắm.

exercises.q: It's very hot in here. I ___ open the window.
exercises.exp: Quyết định tức thì → will ('ll)

exercises.q: I promise I ___ call you as soon as I arrive.
exercises.exp: Lời hứa → will

exercises.q: ___ you help me carry these heavy bags, please?
exercises.exp: Yêu cầu lịch sự → Will you…?

exercises.q: I think it ___ rain later. The sky looks very dark.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán chung → will

exercises.q: She ___ come to the party. She has other plans.
exercises.exp: Phủ định → won't

exercises.q: ___ I help you with that heavy suitcase?
exercises.exp: Đề nghị giúp đỡ lịch sự → Shall I…?

exercises.q: Don't worry — he ___ be late. He's already on his way.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán phủ định → won't

exercises.q: Will she pass the exam? – Yes, she ___.
exercises.exp: Short answer: Yes, she will.

exercises.q: I ___ have the soup, please. (ordering in a restaurant)
exercises.exp: Quyết định tức thì → I'll have…

exercises.q: ___ we go for a walk after dinner?
exercises.exp: Gợi ý → Shall we…?

exercises.q: The weather forecast says it ___ be sunny all weekend.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán → will

exercises.q: I don't think they ___ arrive before midnight.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán phủ định → won't/will not

exercises.q: ___ you be at home this evening? I'd like to visit.
exercises.exp: Hỏi kế hoạch → Will you…?

exercises.q: He ___ probably forget to bring his passport again.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán → will / 'll

exercises.q: Will it snow tomorrow? – No, it ___.
exercises.exp: Short answer phủ định: No, it won't.

exercises.q: ___ what time shall we meet at the station?
exercises.opts: What time will,What time shall,When will,When would
exercises.exp: Gợi ý / hỏi ý kiến → Shall we…?

exercises.q: She wills come to the party tomorrow. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.ans: Wrong – correct: She will come to the party
exercises.exp: Will không chia theo chủ ngữ — luôn là will

exercises.q: I'll help you with that. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.exp: I'll = I will — rút gọn đúng ✔

exercises.q: Will she comes to the meeting? → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.ans: Wrong – correct: Will she come to the meeting?
exercises.exp: Sau will dùng V nguyên thể, không thêm -s

exercises.q: Shall I open the door for you? → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.exp: Shall I…? = đề nghị giúp đỡ lịch sự ✔

exercises.q: Don't worry — I ___ help you with your project tonight.
exercises.exp: Lời hứa/quyết định tức thì → will

exercises.q: It's very stuffy in here. ___ I open a window?
exercises.exp: Đề nghị lịch sự → Shall I…?

exercises.q: I think the weather ___ be nice at the weekend.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán → will

exercises.q: She ___ (not) come to class tomorrow — she's feeling ill.
exercises.exp: Phủ định → won't

exercises.q: ___ you be at the meeting this afternoon?
exercises.exp: Hỏi → Will you…?

exercises.q: I'm hungry. I think I ___ have the pasta, please.
exercises.exp: Quyết định tức thì → I'll

exercises.q: ___ we go to the cinema or stay at home tonight?
exercises.exp: Gợi ý → Shall we…?

exercises.q: He ___ (not) forget — I've already reminded him three times.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán phủ định → won't

exercises.q: Will they arrive on time? – Yes, they ___.
exercises.exp: Short answer: Yes, they will.

exercises.q: I promise I ___ be back before midnight.
exercises.exp: Lời hứa → will

exercises.q: ___ I carry that heavy box for you?
exercises.exp: Đề nghị giúp đỡ → Shall I…?

exercises.q: The meeting ___ (not) start until everyone arrives.
exercises.exp: won't = will not

exercises.q: What time ___ the train leave tomorrow morning?
exercises.exp: What time will + S + V?

exercises.q: I don't think it ___ snow this winter — it's too warm.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán → will (trong câu phủ định với I don't think)

exercises.q: ___ you please pass me the salt?
exercises.exp: Yêu cầu lịch sự → Will you…?

exercises.q: She's very clever — I'm sure she ___ pass the exam easily.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán tích cực → will

exercises.q: ___ we order a taxi now or wait a bit longer?
exercises.exp: Gợi ý → Shall we…?

exercises.q: I ___ (not) tell anyone. I promise to keep it secret.
exercises.exp: Lời hứa phủ định → won't

exercises.q: Will the shops be open on Sunday? – No, they ___.
exercises.exp: Short answer phủ định: No, they won't.

exercises.q: It's getting dark. I think she ___ be home soon.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán → will

reorder.words: I'll help you with your homework this evening
Will you be at home later this afternoon
She won't come to the party because she's busy
I think it will rain later so bring an umbrella
Shall I make you a cup of tea
He'll probably be late because of the traffic
Will the exam be difficult this year
I promise I won't tell anyone about this
Shall we go for a walk after dinner tonight
Don't worry she will call you when she arrives
I'll have the chicken salad please
Will they arrive on time for the meeting
I don't think it will snow this winter
Shall I open the window it's very hot in here
She'll be a great doctor one day I'm sure
We won't be able to finish the project by Friday
What time will the train arrive at the station
I'll send you the details as soon as I know
Will you help me move this heavy furniture please
Shall we meet at the café at seven o'clock

passage.text: Next summer, our school {{1}} (organise) a trip to London. We {{2}} (visit) the British Museum and the National Gallery. I think it {{3}} (be) an incredible experience. Our teacher says we {{4}} (not/have) much free time because the schedule is packed. {{5}} (we/see) Buckingham Palace? Yes, we {{6}} — it is on the itinerary. My friend Ana says she {{7}} (not/enjoy) the long bus journey, but I think she {{8}} (change) her mind once we arrive. I {{9}} (buy) a small gift for my parents. Shall {{10}} (I/take) a lot of photos? Of course — I {{11}} (not/forget) my camera this time!

My little brother is only six years old but he already knows what he {{1}} (do) when he grows up. He says he {{2}} (be) an astronaut. He {{3}} (not/work) in an office — he {{4}} (travel) to space. {{5}} (he/live) on the moon? Probably not, but he {{6}} (try) his best. My parents think it {{7}} (take) a lot of hard work and study. He {{8}} (not/give up) easily though — he is very determined. {{9}} (he/start) by studying science at university? I think he {{10}} (need) to. I {{11}} (support) him whatever he decides to do.

A: I have a terrible headache. I think I {{1}} (go) home early today.
B: {{2}} (I/get) you some water and painkillers?
A: Yes please. I don't think I {{3}} (be) able to finish the report today.
B: Don't worry — I {{4}} (help) you with it tomorrow morning.
A: Are you sure? {{5}} (you/have) time?
B: Yes, I {{6}}. I {{7}} (not/have) any meetings until the afternoon.
A: That's so kind. I {{8}} (not/forget) this.
B: {{9}} (I/call) you a taxi? You look really pale.
A: Please. I {{10}} (not/drive) home like this — it's not safe.
B: I {{11}} (wait) with you until the taxi arrives.

The weather forecast for the weekend says it {{1}} (be) cold and windy on Saturday. It {{2}} (not/rain), but there {{3}} (be) strong winds. Sunday {{4}} (be) much better — the sun {{5}} (come) out and temperatures {{6}} (rise) slightly. I think we {{7}} (be) able to go to the beach on Sunday. {{8}} (you/come) with us? It {{9}} (not/be) too cold if we bring warm clothes. I think it {{10}} (be) fun. My sister says she {{11}} (not/come) because she doesn't like beaches. That's a shame — she {{12}} (enjoy) it, I'm sure.

After the film tonight, we {{1}} (go) to a café for something to eat. I {{2}} (have) the pasta — I'm already decided. Tom says he {{3}} (not/know) what to order until he sees the menu. {{4}} (we/walk) or take a taxi? I think we {{5}} (walk) — it's not far. Anna says she {{6}} (not/come) because she has work early tomorrow. That's a pity — it {{7}} (not/be) the same without her. {{8}} (I/text) her later to check she got home safely. I think the evening {{9}} (be) really enjoyable. What time {{10}} (you/be) ready to leave? I think we {{11}} (need) to leave by nine at the latest.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về những gì bạn nghĩ sẽ xảy ra vào cuối tuần tới (dự đoán, kế hoạch chưa chắc chắn).
writing_prompts.example: I think it will be sunny this weekend, so I'll probably go to the park with my friends. I won't stay at home all day — that would be boring. I'll maybe try a new café nearby. I'm sure it will be a relaxing day.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết lời hứa hoặc đề nghị giúp đỡ dùng will và shall.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: will – promises and offers; shall – suggestions
writing_prompts.example: I promise I'll tidy my room this weekend. I'll do the washing up after dinner too. Shall I make a shopping list? I won't forget to buy milk this time. I'll also call my grandmother — I haven't spoken to her in weeks.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết hội thoại ngắn giữa 2 người đang lên kế hoạch cho một buổi tối dùng will và shall.
writing_prompts.example:
A: Shall we go out for dinner tonight?
B: Yes! I'll book a table at that new Italian place.
A: Will it be expensive?
B: I don't think it will. Shall I check the menu online first?
A: Good idea. I won't be ready until seven — is that okay?
B: Perfect. I'll meet you there.

writing_prompts.vi: Dự đoán về tương lai của bạn hoặc thế giới dùng will/won't.
writing_prompts.example: I think technology will change our lives a lot in the next ten years. People probably won't use cash much — everything will be digital. I don't think cars will disappear, but many will be electric. In my own life, I hope I'll travel more and I won't have to work too many hours.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết email ngắn hứa sẽ làm gì và đề nghị giúp đỡ người nhận, dùng will/won't/shall.
writing_prompts.example:
Hi Maria,
I'll send you the report by Friday morning. I promise I won't forget this time! Shall I include the data from last month as well? I'll make sure everything is ready before our meeting. I won't be late on Thursday — I'll leave home early. Let me know if you need anything else and I'll help straight away.

beginner.title: Future: Be Going To
beginner.content:
📌 Khi nào dùng BE GOING TO
Dùng be going to để nói về:
• Kế hoạch / dự định đã quyết định từ trước: I'm going to study medicine. (đã quyết định)
• Dự đoán dựa trên bằng chứng hiện tại: Look at those clouds — it's going to rain! (nhìn thấy mây)

So sánh will vs be going to:
• Will: quyết định tức thì / dự đoán chung → "The phone's ringing." "I'll get it!"
• Be going to: kế hoạch đã chuẩn bị sẵn → "I'm going to call her later." (đã có ý định từ trước)
📐 Công thức đầy đủ
Loại câuCông thứcVí dụ
Khẳng địnhS + am/is/are going to + VI'm going to travel. She's going to study.
Phủ địnhS + am/is/are not going to + VI'm not going to eat. He's not going to come.
Câu hỏi Yes/NoAm/Is/Are + S + going to + V?Are you going to come? Is she going to call?
Câu hỏi Wh-Wh- + am/is/are + S + going to + V?What are you going to do? Where is she going to go?
✅ Trả lời ngắn
Are you going to come? – Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
Is she going to call? – Yes, she is. / No, she's not / she isn't.
Are they going to stay? – Yes, they are. / No, they're not / they aren't.
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ She is go to study. → ✅ She is going to study.
❌ I am going to studied. → ✅ I am going to study. (sau going to → V nguyên thể)
❌ Are you go to come? → ✅ Are you going to come?
❌ He going to leave soon. → ✅ He is going to leave soon.
I'm going to visit my grandmother this weekend — I already bought the train ticket.Tôi sẽ thăm bà ngoại cuối tuần này — tôi đã mua vé tàu rồi.
Look at that car — it's going to crash!Nhìn chiếc xe kia — nó sắp đâm vào đó!
Are you going to apply for that new job? – Yes, I am.Bạn có định xin việc đó không? – Có.

exercises.q: She ___ study medicine at university next year. She's already applied.
exercises.opts: is going to,will,is go to,goes to
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã quyết định → be going to

exercises.q: Look at those black clouds! It ___ rain very soon.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán có bằng chứng → is going to

exercises.q: Are you going to come to the party? – No, I ___.
exercises.exp: Short answer phủ định: No, I'm not.

exercises.q: They ___ move to a new flat next month — the lease is already signed.
exercises.opts: are going to,will,going to,are go to
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã sắp xếp → are going to

exercises.q: ___ she going to take the entrance exam this year?
exercises.exp: Câu hỏi → Is she going to…?

exercises.q: Be careful — you ___ fall if you run on that wet floor.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán có bằng chứng → are going to

exercises.q: He ___ quit his job. He told me his decision last week.
exercises.opts: is going to,will,going to,is go to
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã quyết định → is going to

exercises.q: Is the team going to win? – Yes, they ___.
exercises.exp: Short answer: Yes, they are.

exercises.q: What ___ you going to do after you graduate?
exercises.exp: What are you going to…?

exercises.q: I ___ not going to eat meat anymore — I've made my decision.
exercises.exp: I am not going to… (phủ định)

exercises.q: She looks exhausted. She ___ faint if she doesn't sit down.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán có bằng chứng → is going to

exercises.q: We ___ paint the living room next weekend. We've already bought the paint.
exercises.opts: are going to,will,going to,are go to
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã chuẩn bị → are going to

exercises.q: ___ your parents going to visit you this summer?
exercises.exp: Are + they + going to…?

exercises.q: He ___ apply for the job. He already sent his CV yesterday.
exercises.opts: is going to,will,going to,is go to
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã thực hiện → is going to

exercises.q: Is she going to call back? – No, she ___.
exercises.exp: Short answer phủ định: No, she isn't.

exercises.q: Watch out! That vase ___ fall!
exercises.exp: Dự đoán tức thì có bằng chứng → is going to

exercises.q: She is go to study in London next year. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.ans: Wrong – correct: She is going to study in London
exercises.exp: Phải dùng 'going to', không phải 'go to'

exercises.q: Are they going to move to a new city? – Yes, they are. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.exp: Are + they + going to…? → Yes, they are. ✔

exercises.q: I am going to studied abroad next year. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.ans: Wrong – correct: I am going to study abroad
exercises.exp: Sau 'going to' dùng V nguyên thể

exercises.q: Look! It's going to snow — the sky is getting very grey. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.exp: Dự đoán có bằng chứng hiện tại → is going to ✔

exercises.q: I ___ (go) to the gym three times a week from now on. I've decided.
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã quyết định → am going to go

exercises.q: Look at that player — he ___ (score) any second now!
exercises.exp: Dự đoán có bằng chứng → is going to score

exercises.q: ___ (they/move) to a new house next month?
exercises.exp: Are + they + going to + V?

exercises.q: She ___ (not/study) law — she changed her mind last week.
exercises.exp: Phủ định → isn't going to + V

exercises.q: We ___ (visit) Paris this summer. We've already booked the flights.
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã sắp xếp → are going to visit

exercises.q: Careful! You ___ (spill) that coffee!
exercises.exp: Dự đoán tức thì → are going to spill

exercises.q: ___ (she/take) the job offer? She has until Friday to decide.
exercises.exp: Is + she + going to + V?

exercises.q: He ___ (not/come) to the dinner — he has a prior engagement.
exercises.exp: isn't going to + V

exercises.q: What ___ (you/study) when you start university?
exercises.exp: What + are + you + going to + V?

exercises.q: They ___ (open) a new branch of the restaurant downtown.
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã quyết định → are going to open

exercises.q: Is she going to apply for the scholarship? – Yes, she ___.
exercises.exp: Short answer: Yes, she is.

exercises.q: ___ (he/retire) next year? He's been talking about it for ages.
exercises.exp: Is + he + going to + V?

exercises.q: I ___ (not/eat) any more sweets this month. Doctor's orders!
exercises.exp: am not going to + V

exercises.q: Look at the sky — it ___ (storm) tonight for sure.
exercises.exp: Dự đoán có bằng chứng → is going to storm

exercises.q: Where ___ (they/go) for their honeymoon?
exercises.exp: Where + are + they + going to + V?

exercises.q: She ___ (learn) Japanese — she's already enrolled in a class.
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã thực hiện → is going to learn

exercises.q: Are you going to finish the report tonight? – No, I ___.
exercises.exp: Short answer phủ định: No, I'm not.

exercises.q: We ___ (not/take) the motorway — there are roadworks.
exercises.exp: aren't going to + V

exercises.q: He ___ (buy) a new laptop — he saved up enough money.
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã chuẩn bị → is going to buy

exercises.q: ___ (you/tell) her the news or shall I?
exercises.exp: Are + you + going to + V?

reorder.words: She is going to study medicine at university
Look at those clouds it is going to rain
Are you going to come to the party tonight
They are going to move to a new flat next month
He is not going to quit his job after all
What are you going to do after you graduate
We are going to paint the living room this weekend
Is she going to take the exam in June
I am not going to eat meat anymore
Be careful you are going to drop that glass
Are your parents going to visit you this summer
He is going to apply for a new job next week
Where are they going to go for their holiday
She is not going to accept that offer it is too low
Is he going to retire at the end of the year
We are not going to take the motorway because of roadworks
Look out that car is going to crash
I am going to learn Spanish when I have more time
Are they going to open a new café in town
She is going to be a brilliant teacher one day

passage.text: My best friend Linh has big plans for next year. She {{1}} (study) environmental science at university — she already received her acceptance letter. After that, she {{2}} (work) for a conservation charity. She {{3}} (not/take) a gap year because she wants to start as soon as possible. {{4}} (she/move) to another city for her studies? Yes, she {{5}} — she's already found a flat. Her parents {{6}} (help) her move. Look at her schedule — she {{7}} (be) very busy! She {{8}} (not/have) much free time at first. {{9}} (she/miss) her hometown? I think she {{10}}, but she's very excited. She {{11}} (make) the most of every opportunity.

This Saturday, our football team {{1}} (play) in the regional final. The coach {{2}} (make) some important changes to the team. Our star player {{3}} (not/start) because of an injury. {{4}} (the team/use) a different formation? Yes, they {{5}}. The supporters {{6}} (travel) from all over the region to watch. Look at the ticket sales — the stadium {{7}} (be) completely full. {{8}} (the weather/cause) any problems? The forecast says it {{9}} (rain), so the pitch {{10}} (be) slippery. Our captain says the team {{11}} (give) everything they have. {{12}} (we/win)? I hope so!

blanks.4: Is the team going to use
blanks.8: Is the weather going to cause

passage.text: I have been feeling stressed recently, so I {{1}} (make) some changes to my lifestyle. First, I {{2}} (join) a yoga class — I already registered online. I {{3}} (not/work) late every evening anymore. {{4}} (I/also/try) to sleep eight hours a night. My doctor says I {{5}} (feel) much better if I reduce stress. I {{6}} (not/check) my emails after seven in the evening. {{7}} (I/cook) healthy meals at home instead of ordering takeaway. Am I {{8}} (give up) all my bad habits? Yes, I {{9}}! Look at my plan — I {{10}} (be) very disciplined. My friend says I {{11}} (not/last) more than a week. I'll prove her wrong!

blanks.4: Am I also going to try

passage.text: Our city {{1}} (build) a new metro line starting next spring. The construction {{2}} (take) about three years to complete. Several major roads {{3}} (close) during the work. {{4}} (the project/cause) much disruption? The mayor says it {{5}} (not/be) as bad as people think. New stations {{6}} (open) in the suburbs. {{7}} (the new line/connect) the airport to the city centre? Yes, it {{8}}. Thousands of commuters {{9}} (benefit) from faster travel times. The government {{10}} (also/invest) in new buses. {{11}} (the old tram line/stay) open? No, it {{12}} — it is going to close permanently.

blanks.4: Is the project going to cause
blanks.7: Is the new line going to connect
blanks.11: Is the old tram line going to stay

passage.text: Next month, my family {{1}} (celebrate) my grandparents' fiftieth wedding anniversary. My aunt {{2}} (organise) a big party at a local restaurant. She {{3}} (not/tell) my grandparents in advance — it {{4}} (be) a surprise. {{5}} (all the relatives/come) from different parts of the country? Yes, they {{6}}. My cousin {{7}} (make) a special cake. {{8}} (we/show) old photographs and videos? Yes, definitely — my uncle {{9}} (prepare) a slideshow. My grandmother {{10}} (not/know) anything about it. When she walks in, everyone {{11}} (shout) surprise! {{12}} (she/cry)? Probably — she always does at emotional moments!

blanks.5: Are all the relatives going to come

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về kế hoạch của bạn cho kỳ nghỉ hè tới dùng be going to.
writing_prompts.example: This summer I'm going to travel around Vietnam with my family. We're going to visit Hoi An and Ha Long Bay. I'm not going to stay at home all summer — that would be a waste. I've already booked the tickets. Are you going to do anything special?

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả kế hoạch của một người bạn hoặc thành viên gia đình dùng be going to.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: be going to – third person plans
writing_prompts.example: My brother is going to start a new job next month. He's going to work for a technology company. He isn't going to live at home anymore — he's going to rent a flat near his office. He's already signed the contract. His girlfriend is going to help him move.

writing_prompts.vi: Nhìn vào các tình huống và dự đoán điều sắp xảy ra dùng be going to.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: be going to – predictions based on evidence
hint_words: She looks like she's going to
writing_prompts.example: Look at those dark clouds — it's going to storm soon. That runner looks exhausted — she's going to stop any minute. The car ahead is going very fast — it's going to crash! The baby is crying a lot — she's going to need feeding. The team is playing badly — they're going to lose.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về mục tiêu hoặc quyết định cá nhân dùng be going to.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: be going to – personal decisions and resolutions
writing_prompts.example: I've made some important decisions for this year. I'm going to study English every day for at least thirty minutes. I'm not going to spend so much time on social media — it's a real time-waster. I'm also going to exercise three times a week. From now on, I'm going to cook at home more instead of eating out.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết đoạn hội thoại giữa hai người hỏi và trả lời về kế hoạch tương lai dùng be going to.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: be going to – questions and answers
writing_prompts.example:
A: Are you going to apply for that scholarship?
B: Yes, I am. I'm going to submit my application this week.
A: What are you going to study?
B: I'm going to study computer science.
A: Is your sister going to apply too?
B: No, she isn't. She's going to take a gap year instead.
A: Where is she going to go?
B: She's going to volunteer in Thailand.
